_comment: Plugin hook wiring. The PreToolUse hook intercepts the custom submit_review MCP tool, captures the real diff + PR metadata, opens the review UI, and BLOCKS until the reviewer is done (long timeout = 4 days). Uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} + bun so it runs from a local --plugin-dir with no global install. PreToolUse is chosen over PermissionRequest because it always fires, even in auto-accept modes. The matcher is an alternation because a plugin-bundled MCP server names its tools mcp__plugin_<plugin>_<server>__<tool> (here mcp__plugin_review-buddy_review-buddy__submit_review), NOT the mcp__<server>__<tool> form a user-configured .mcp.json server uses — both are covered so the hook fires either way. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp#plugin-provided-mcp-servers and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
